UCS-115  MARKING OF CARBON AND LOW ALLOY STEEL MATERIALS. (a) All carbon and low alloy steel materials shall be marked with the specification number, grade, heat number, and any other identification required by the material specification, in accordance with UG-81. (b) Marks shall be transferred before cutting, using methods that do not impair the material properties. (c) For pressure-retaining materials, the identification shall be traceable to the material test report as required by UG-93. Material requirements shall comply with UG-80. See also UCS-100 for plate specifications. Impact-tested materials shall be additionally marked per UCS-56.
